ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league to which the team belongs */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_crest" TEXT /* Team crest image URL */,
  "home_kit_colors" TEXT /* Home kit colors */,
  "away_kit_colors" TEXT /* Away kit colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the performance record */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the performance record */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Number of matches won */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated */,
  "promotion_status" INTEGER /* Whether the team got promoted */,
  "relegation_status" INTEGER /* Whether the team got relegated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is held */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the league */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier of the league (e.g., 1 for top tier, 2 for second tier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in management */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Playing position of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contract" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Annual bonus of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for fan engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for matches */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of times the team was mentioned on social media */,
  "merchandise_sales" REAL /* Total sales of merchandise in dollars */,
  "average_attendance" REAL /* Average attendance per match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., assistant coach, fitness coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in coaching */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for schedule entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match scheduled */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is to be played */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for historical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team related to the historical record */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the historical performance */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Matches played in the season */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Matches won in the season */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Matches drawn in the season */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Matches lost in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals conceded in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated in the season */,
  "promotion_status" INTEGER /* Whether the team got promoted */,
  "relegation_status" INTEGER /* Whether the team got relegated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, linesman) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_officials_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_results ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the injury in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
